series_metadata.series_title: Annual Report of UCF Content of Safe Deposit Boxes
series_metadata.series_description: Form used as a summary to report safe deposit box content by individual owner, also contains original records that account for and justify owner contents removed from safe deposit boxes and sold at a public auction.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: indefinitely or claimed. paid in full, paper safe deposit report is electronically imaged. ; Electronic: Retained permanently beginning January 1, 2020
